# Dr WELI (Dr Weliton Menário Costa)

> Sydney-based Brazilian-born music artist and behavioural ecologist (PhD, ANU). AAAS Dance Your PhD Global Winner 2024; Falling Walls Engage 2025 Top 30. Founder of WildWooHoo, a science-art studio in Sydney. Books and performs in English and Portuguese.

## Book Dr WELI
- [Speaking, workshops & programs](https://drweli.com/program/)
- [School incursions & STEAM workshops](https://drweli.com/program/schools/)
- [University research-communication workshops](https://drweli.com/program/universities/)
- [Corporate keynotes & team workshops](https://drweli.com/program/corporate/)
- [Science-art collaborations & residencies](https://drweli.com/program/science-art/)
- [Enquire / bookings](https://drweli.com/enquire/)
